meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop starting and start shipping. Learn how to leverage portfolio building to break the cycle of unfinished projects using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of market-facing constraints. By shifting your focus from 'building a product' to 'building a portfolio of micro-SaaS MVPs,' you create artificial deadlines. Use Antigravity to scaffold architecture and Claude Code to iterate, ensuring every line of code contributes to a shippable asset.
content.intro:
You have a graveyard of half-baked repositories and a folder full of abandoned ideas. The 'Founder's Curse' isn't a lack of talent; it's the lack of a shipping mechanism. Every day your code stays on your hard drive, it loses value, and your momentum dies a little more.

But what if you stopped trying to build the next unicorn and started building a portfolio of high-velocity, revenue-ready experiments? By treating your projects as modular portfolio pieces, you replace the crushing weight of 'perfection' with the exhilaration of 'production.' It is time to turn your unfinished code into a launchpad for your career.

steps.title: Define the Micro-Scope
steps.description: Narrow your vision to a single, solvable user problem. This prevents feature creep and ensures you can finish in under 48 hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this problem statement: [Insert Idea]. Break it down into a 4-hour MVP scope that includes only one core feature and a Stripe payment link.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a project roadmap based on the Antigravity scope'

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready boilerplate. Stop manually configuring environments and focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase boilerplate. Include authentication and a basic dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with the generated boilerplate'

steps.title: Rapid Logic Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write your core business logic. Focus on the 'Happy Path' and ignore edge cases for now.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for the core feature identified in Step 1. Ensure it follows clean architecture principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement core feature logic from Antigravity output'

steps.title: Automate Deployment
steps.description: If you don't deploy, it doesn't exist. Automate your CI/CD pipeline so every commit is a live update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel-compatible deployment configuration for this project. Include environment variable templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure deployment and verify environment variables'

steps.title: Portfolio Documentation
steps.description: Write a 3-sentence 'Founder's Log' for the project. This makes the project a portfolio asset instead of just code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a compelling README for this project that highlights the problem solved, the tech stack used, and the business impact.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'create README.md based on the project summary'

pro_tips: Never spend more than 48 hours on an MVP; if it takes longer, you are building a product, not a portfolio piece.
Always include a 'Buy Now' button even if the backend isn't finished; it forces you to prioritize monetization.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code for readability, not performance; your portfolio needs to show clean, maintainable code to potential investors.
Every project must have a live URL in your GitHub bio; if it's not live, it's just a sandbox exercise.
Treat your code comments as a diary; documenting your 'why' is more valuable to recruiters/investors than the 'how'.
content.next_steps: Select one idea from your 'unfinished' list, apply the 48-hour rule, and publish your first live portfolio link today.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas rot in private repositories. You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. It’s time to ship your first portfolio asset and prove your value to the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
